SEARCH
Package org.atmosphere.interceptor

Class BackpressureInterceptor

java.lang.Object
org.atmosphere.cpr.AtmosphereInterceptorAdapter
org.atmosphere.interceptor.BackpressureInterceptor
All Implemented Interfaces:
AtmosphereInterceptor, AtmosphereConfigAware, InvokationOrder
public class BackpressureInterceptor extends AtmosphereInterceptorAdapter
Backpressure interceptor that tracks per-client pending message counts and applies configurable policies when a client falls behind.

Configuration (init-params or ApplicationConfig)

  • org.atmosphere.backpressure.highWaterMark — max pending messages per client (default: 1000)
  • org.atmosphere.backpressure.policy — what to do when exceeded: drop-oldest, drop-newest, disconnect (default: drop-oldest)

Usage


 framework.interceptor(new BackpressureInterceptor());
Since:
4.0

    • configure

      public void configure(AtmosphereConfig config)
      Description copied from interface: AtmosphereConfigAware
      Configure an AtmosphereFramework object.
      Specified by:
      configure in interface AtmosphereConfigAware

      Parameters:
      config - AtmosphereConfig

    • inspect

      public Action inspect(AtmosphereResource r)
      Description copied from interface: AtmosphereInterceptor
      Invoked before an AtmosphereResource gets dispatched to AtmosphereHandler.
      Specified by:
      inspect in interface AtmosphereInterceptor
      Overrides:
      inspect in class AtmosphereInterceptorAdapter
      Parameters:
      r - a AtmosphereResource
      Returns:
      Action.CONTINUE or Action.SUSPEND to dispatch the AtmosphereResource to other AtmosphereInterceptor or AtmosphereHandler. Return Action.TYPE.CANCELLED to stop the processing.

    • allowMessage

      public boolean allowMessage(String uuid)
      Check if a message can be delivered to the given resource. Call this before queueing a message for delivery.
      Parameters:
      uuid - the resource UUID
      Returns:
      true if the message should be delivered, false if dropped

    • pendingCount

      public int pendingCount(String uuid)
      Returns:
      the number of pending messages for the given resource

    • totalDrops

      public long totalDrops()
      Returns:
      total messages dropped due to backpressure

    • totalDisconnects

      public long totalDisconnects()
      Returns:
      total clients disconnected due to backpressure

    • highWaterMark

      public int highWaterMark()
      Returns:
      the configured high water mark

      the configured policy
